Role: AI Data Scientist
Send me your Resume to my E- sukesh@nebulapartners.com 

Key Responsibilities:
Perform statistical analysis, clustering, and probability modeling
Analyze graph data to detect anomalies and extract patterns
Build NLP pipelines (NER, entity resolution, ontology extraction)
Develop, test, and deploy ML models and data-driven services
Apply ML Ops practices (experiment tracking, monitoring, reproducibility)
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver AI solutions
Required Skills:
Strong experience in statistical modeling and machine learning
Hands-on expertise with NLP (NER, entity extraction, etc.)
Experience with graph data analysis and anomaly detection
Proficiency in Python and AI/ML libraries
Understanding of ML Ops fundamentals
Strong problem-solving and communication skills

🚀 We’re Hiring: Senior SDET (Automation + AI)
📍 Location: Hybrid / Remote
🕒 Shift: 3 PM – 12 AM
💼 Experience: 8+ Years
      Position : Contract,( Contract tenure upto 1 year)
📌 UAN: Mandatory


🔍 Role Overview:
We are looking for a highly skilled Senior SDET to drive test automation, AI-powered QA practices, and internal QA tool development. This role is ideal for someone passionate about building scalable automation frameworks and leveraging AI to enhance quality engineering.


🛠️ Key Skills Required:
✔ Strong expertise in Automation Framework Development
✔ Hands-on experience with JavaScript & Playwright
✔ Experience with AI tools (GitHub Copilot / LLM-based tools)
✔ Strong knowledge of CI/CD (GitHub Actions preferred)
✔ Performance testing using JMeter
✔ API testing using Postman / GraphQL
✔ Experience building QA tools / automation utilities
✔ Good understanding of Agile & QA best practices


📌 Key Responsibilities:
🔹 Build & maintain scalable automation frameworks
🔹 Implement AI-driven testing strategies
🔹 Develop QA enablement tools (copilots, dashboards, utilities)
🔹 Perform functional, regression, API & performance testing
🔹 Collaborate with cross-functional teams & mentor junior members
🔹 Provide quality insights & support releases


✨ Good to Have:
➕ Experience with Docker & databases
➕ Exposure to AI/ML testing & agent-based workflows
➕ Experience building internal QA platforms

📩 Interested candidates can share their resume or DM for more details.
puja@itexpertsoltuions.in

Renganayaki Nagarajan • 3rd+

🚀 Hiring: AI Full Stack Engineer (C2C | Remote)

We are looking for an experienced AI Full Stack Engineer with 8+ years of experience to join our team on a Contract (C2C) basis. If you’re passionate about building scalable AI-powered applications and working with cutting-edge technologies, this could be a great opportunity!

🔹 Role: AI Full Stack Engineer
🔹 Experience: 8+ Years
🔹 Location: 100% Remote
🔹 Type: Contract (C2C)

💡 Key Responsibilities:
Design and develop end-to-end AI-driven applications
Build scalable backend services and responsive frontends
Integrate machine learning models into production systems
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality solutions
Optimize performance, scalability, and reliability

🛠️ Required Skills:
Strong experience in full stack development (Frontend + Backend)
Hands-on with AI/ML frameworks and model deployment
Proficiency in Python, JavaScript (React/Angular), Node.js
Experience with cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP)
Solid understanding of APIs, microservices, and system design

✨ Nice to Have:
Experience with LLMs, Generative AI, or NLP
Familiarity with Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines

📩 Interested candidates, please share your resume or tag someone who would be a great fit!

🚀 Hiring: AI Full Stack Engineer (C2C | Remote)

We are looking for an experienced AI Full Stack Engineer with 8+ years of experience to join our team on a Contract (C2C) basis. If you’re passionate about building scalable AI-powered applications and working with cutting-edge technologies, this could be a great opportunity!

🔹 Role: AI Full Stack Engineer
🔹 Experience: 8+ Years
🔹 Location: 100% Remote
🔹 Type: Contract (C2C)

💡 Key Responsibilities:
Design and develop end-to-end AI-driven applications
Build scalable backend services and responsive frontends
Integrate machine learning models into production systems
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality solutions
Optimize performance, scalability, and reliability

🛠️ Required Skills:
Strong experience in full stack development (Frontend + Backend)
Hands-on with AI/ML frameworks and model deployment
Proficiency in Python, JavaScript (React/Angular), Node.js
Experience with cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP)
Solid understanding of APIs, microservices, and system design

✨ Nice to Have:
Experience with LLMs, Generative AI, or NLP
Familiarity with Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines

📩 Interested candidates, please share your resume or tag someone who would be a great fit!
